attacking_style: Launches sustained accelerations on long, high-altitude climbs (7000+ feet), typically 4-14km from summit. Struggles with explosive short punchy finales and attacks launched in final 1-2km, often timing moves too early on steep irregular gradients.
team_tactics: Relies heavily on domestique-led tempo control into final climbs (ANACONA, SOLER pacing). Movistar/Arkéa coordinate family support (brother Dayer). Often passive in marking mode without numerical advantage, waiting for others to initiate rather than forcing selection.
terrain_preference: Excels at sustained high-altitude climbs (14-15% gradients, above 7000 feet) where rhythm climbing dominates. Exposed on short explosive finales, rolling threshold terrain, time trials (chronic 50-90 second losses), crosswinds, and technical steep ramps requiring repeated accelerations.
vulnerability: Collapses on 12-13% irregular steep gradients requiring repeated accelerations. Time trials consistently cost 50+ seconds. Third-week form deterioration pattern evident (Grand Colombier -3:48, multiple Tour/Vuelta fadeouts). Cannot respond to modern explosive climbing accelerations under 3km.
key_patterns: Chronic time trial weakness: loses 49-89 seconds consistently, preventing stage race victories (17 observations)
Third-week collapse pattern: repeatedly cracks in final Grand Tour week losing podium positions (8 observations)
Attacks too early on finales: premature accelerations at 1-4km neutralized by lighter explosive climbers (6 observations)
High-altitude resurgence: multiple stage wins and form peaks above 7000 feet on sustained gradients (5 observations)
Cannot handle explosive accelerations under 2.5km: dropped when rivals attack inside final 3km (9 observations)
Movistar internal tension: sprint finishes against Valverde, unclear leadership sacrifice versus weakness (4 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 Tour showed brief renaissance (3rd overall) but finished 5th. 2020-2021 marked by consistent cracking on climbs, losing polka dots, and inability to follow modern accelerations. Recent years show tactical presence without decisive power.
